title: Knip dead-code detector (zero-baseline, lint-step)
description: Per D35: knip.config.ts with zero baseline (no exceptions); integrated into pnpm lint script alongside ESLint. After TASK-025 dead code removal, knip should report zero issues; this task adds the gate to prevent future drift.
scope: Layer 2 P1 — CI gate against dead code reintroduction

files.change: NEW: monorepo workspaces config; entry points = packages/cli/src/index.ts + packages/server/src/index.ts; ignored deps minimal; exclude __tests__/ from unused detection
Add knip to devDependencies; lint script: 'eslint . && knip --strict'
Per-workspace exports map verified (knip uses these)

criteria: knip --strict exits 0 against current codebase (after TASK-025)
pnpm lint runs both eslint and knip
Adding a deliberate unused export fails knip in CI
No false positives from test fixtures
